title: APEX Model Catalog
description: Shape of .github/model-catalog.json. The catalog has two roles: (1) `models` is hand-maintained metadata that authorizes which Copilot Chat model labels APEX agents may use; (2) `assignments` is auto-generated from agent/subagent frontmatter and mirrors the canonical agent → model mapping. Frontmatter remains the single source of truth; the registry mirrors it; the catalog records authorized labels and a generated inventory.

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 date of last catalog update.

models.description: Hand-maintained metadata keyed by model display name. Acts as the authorized-label allow-list.

tier.description: Capability tier descriptor (documentation only; floor enforcement was retired).

deprecated.description: Whether the model is deprecated. Deprecated entries may remain for audit history but must not appear in active assignments.

use_for.description: Recommended use cases for this model.

governance.description: Documents the canonical source-of-truth chain and the catalog's role within it.

source_of_truth.description: Plain-language statement of which file is canonical (agent frontmatter).

rules.description: Invariants enforced by the catalog validator.

assignments.description: Auto-generated inventory of agent → model assignments. Do not edit by hand; regenerate via `node tools/scripts/generate-model-catalog.mjs`.

generated.description: Always true; marks the block as generator-owned.

generated_by.description: Path to the generator script that produced this block.

agents.description: Map of agent file basename (e.g. 01-orchestrator.agent.md) to its frontmatter model label.

subagents.description: Map of subagent file basename to its frontmatter model label.
